_description: PSProxmoxVE stable findings ledger. IDs are permanent (F001, F002...). Resolved findings are never deleted — they are marked resolved with evidence. If a finding reappears, it is marked regressed and retains its original ID.

findings.title: No PSGallery publish workflow
findings.description: No CI/CD workflow for publishing to PSGallery. Cannot automate releases.

resolution.evidence: publish.yml workflow added, triggered on tag push with Publish-Module and GitHub Release creation

findings.title: README says 'not PSGallery'
findings.description: README installation section says module is not on PSGallery, contradicting publication goal.

resolution.evidence: README updated with Install-Module PSProxmoxVE instructions

findings.title: No ReleaseNotes in manifest PSData
findings.description: PSGallery strongly recommends ReleaseNotes in module manifest PSData section.

resolution.evidence: ReleaseNotes added to PSData section of manifest

findings.title: No HelpMessage on any cmdlet parameter
findings.description: Get-Help shows no parameter descriptions because HelpMessage attribute is missing on all [Parameter] attributes.

resolution.evidence: HelpMessage present on virtually all parameters across all 83 cmdlets

findings.title: No WriteVerbose in cmdlets except Connection
findings.description: Users cannot see which API calls are being made. Only Connection cmdlets use WriteVerbose.

resolution.evidence: WriteVerbose used extensively throughout all cmdlets

findings.title: Missing CONTRIBUTING.md
findings.description: No contributor guide with dev setup, coding standards, test instructions, or PR process.

resolution.evidence: CONTRIBUTING.md created with prerequisites, building, tests, coding standards, PR process

findings.title: Missing SECURITY.md
findings.description: No vulnerability disclosure policy.

resolution.evidence: SECURITY.md created with vulnerability disclosure policy and 48h response SLA

findings.title: No WriteWarning on -SkipCertificateCheck
findings.description: Users may not realize they are disabling TLS certificate verification.

resolution.evidence: WriteWarning emitted with man-in-the-middle advisory when SkipCertificateCheck is used

findings.title: Reset-PveVm uses hardcoded verb string literal
findings.description: Reset-PveVm uses [Cmdlet("Reset", ...)] instead of VerbsCommon.Reset, inconsistent with all other cmdlets.

resolution.evidence: Now uses VerbsCommon.Reset constant

findings.title: Missing GitHub issue and PR templates
findings.description: No structured issue reporting or PR process templates.

resolution.evidence: Bug report (YAML), feature request (YAML), and PR template added

findings.title: Stop-PveVm and Reset-PveVm lack ConfirmImpact.High
findings.description: Stopping or resetting VMs can cause data loss but these cmdlets don't prompt for confirmation by default.

resolution.evidence: ConfirmImpact.High added to both Stop-PveVm and Reset-PveVm

findings.title: No ValidateRange on VmId parameters
findings.description: PVE requires VMID 100-999999999 but no ValidateRange attribute enforces this.

resolution.evidence: ValidateRange(100, 999999999) added to all VmId parameters

findings.title: Container snapshots not supported
findings.description: Snapshots are only implemented for VMs, not LXC containers, despite PVE supporting both.

resolution.evidence: 4 container snapshot cmdlets added: Get/New/Remove/Restore-PveContainerSnapshot

findings.title: No integration tests for network modifications
findings.description: Network CRUD (create/modify/delete/apply) is tested only at Pester level, not end-to-end.

resolution.evidence: Integration tests added for network create/modify/delete/apply with revert

findings.title: No CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md
findings.description: Expected for open-source projects to establish community standards.

resolution.evidence: Contributor Covenant v2.1 adopted

findings.title: No .gitattributes file
findings.description: Line ending consistency across platforms not enforced.

resolution.evidence: .gitattributes added with line ending normalization, csharp diff, binary markers

findings.title: CS1591 suppressed in Core project
findings.description: Public API lacks XML documentation because CS1591 warning is suppressed.

resolution.evidence: CS1591 no longer suppressed, XML doc comments added to all public types

findings.title: No badges in README
findings.description: No build status, PSGallery version, or license badges to improve discoverability and trust.

resolution.evidence: Build, Unit Tests, License badges added to README

findings.title: CHANGELOG has only [Unreleased] section
findings.description: No versioned release entries in CHANGELOG, no release history.

resolution.evidence: 0.1.0-preview versioned entry added to CHANGELOG

findings.title: Invoke-PveVmGuestExec lacks ShouldProcess
findings.description: Executes commands inside a VM (a mutating operation) but does not implement SupportsShouldProcess.

resolution.evidence: SupportsShouldProcess added; all destructive/mutating cmdlets now implement it

findings.title: No IconUri in manifest PSData
findings.description: Improves PSGallery listing appearance. Cosmetic only.

findings.title: No online help (MAML/platyPS)
findings.description: Get-Help -Online does not work. No MAML help file for cmdlet documentation.

resolution.evidence: MAML help file (PSProxmoxVE.dll-Help.xml) present with 75 cmdlet documentation files in docs/cmdlets/

findings.title: No firewall cmdlets
findings.description: No cmdlets for creating/managing firewall rules at cluster, node, or VM level. Critical gap for security automation.

resolution.evidence: 21 cluster-level firewall cmdlets added covering rules, groups, aliases, IP sets, options, and refs

findings.title: No backup/vzdump cmdlets
findings.description: Essential for DR automation. No cmdlets for creating backups, managing schedules, or restoring.

resolution.evidence: 6 backup cmdlets added: New-PveBackup, Get/New/Set/Remove-PveBackupJob, Get-PveBackupInfo

findings.title: No pool management cmdlets
findings.description: Required for multi-tenant environments. No cmdlets for creating/managing resource pools.

resolution.evidence: 4 pool cmdlets added: Get/New/Set/Remove-PvePool

findings.title: new Random() used for multipart boundary generation
findings.description: Not cryptographically secure. Low risk for multipart boundaries but could use RandomNumberGenerator.

resolution.evidence: RandomNumberGenerator now used for boundary generation

findings.title: No alias support in module
findings.description: Some users prefer short aliases for frequently used cmdlets.

resolution.evidence: 7 aliases defined in module manifest AliasesToExport

findings.title: No tagged releases or GitHub Releases
findings.description: No GitHub Releases configured, no release workflow, no tagged releases in git history.

resolution.evidence: publish.yml creates GitHub Releases via softprops/action-gh-release on tag push

findings.title: No container migration cmdlet
findings.description: VMs have Move-PveVm for migration but containers have no equivalent.

resolution.evidence: Move-PveContainer cmdlet added for container migration

findings.title: No SDN subnet management cmdlets
findings.description: SDN zones and VNets exist but subnets are missing.

resolution.evidence: 3 SDN subnet cmdlets added: Get/New/Remove-PveSdnSubnet

findings.title: Hardcoded test password in CI workflow and Terraform
findings.description: PVE_PASSWORD: 'Testpass123!' in integration-tests.yml and variables.tf. Masked via ::add-mask::. Disposable nested test VM. Accepted risk.

findings.title: Infinite loop task-polling in VM snapshot and network cmdlets
findings.description: while(true) with no timeout in InvokePveNetworkApply, NewPveSnapshot, RestorePveSnapshot, RemovePveSnapshot private WaitForTask methods. Cmdlets hang forever if task stalls.

resolution.evidence: All four cmdlets now use TaskService.WaitForTask with timeout enforcement, failure detection, and WriteProgress support

findings.title: Infinite poll loop in InvokePveVmGuestExec
findings.description: while(true) polling exec-status with no timeout. Cmdlet hangs forever if guest exec never completes.

resolution.evidence: Added Timeout parameter with Stopwatch + TimeoutException

findings.title: RemovePveRoleCmdlet missing ConfirmImpact.High
findings.description: Deleting roles is a significant, potentially disruptive operation but does not prompt for confirmation.

resolution.evidence: ConfirmImpact = ConfirmImpact.High added

findings.title: Pool/CephPool parameter conflict in NewPveStorageCmdlet
findings.description: New-PveStorage allows specifying both Pool and CephPool parameters simultaneously, which is invalid.

resolution.evidence: Runtime validation added with ThrowTerminatingError if both Pool and CephPool specified

findings.title: Duplicated WaitForTask methods across cmdlets
findings.description: 4 VM/network cmdlets had copy-pasted private WaitForTask implementations instead of using the shared TaskService.

resolution.evidence: All cmdlets now use TaskService.WaitForTask

findings.title: ~54 cmdlets missing OutputType attribute
findings.description: Approximately 54 cmdlets lack [OutputType] attribute, degrading IntelliSense and pipeline type inference.

resolution.evidence: All 169 cmdlets now have [OutputType] attributes

findings.title: Firewall VmId defaults to 0 instead of nullable
findings.description: Firewall cmdlet VmId parameter uses int with default 0 instead of nullable int, making it impossible to distinguish unset from VM 0.

resolution.evidence: VmId changed to nullable int pattern

findings.title: Bare catch blocks in PveHttpClient, PveCmdletBase, VmService, ContainerService, GetPveVmCmdlet
findings.description: Multiple bare catch {} blocks swallow exceptions silently, hiding errors and making debugging difficult.

resolution.evidence: All bare catches replaced with filtered catch (Exception ex) when (...) clauses that exclude OOM/SOE and are specific to PveApiException/HttpRequestException where appropriate

findings.title: Broad exception catches in status polling
findings.description: Filtered catch(Exception ex) when(...) clauses are better than bare catches but still catch broadly. Could be more specific exception types.

resolution.evidence: PveCmdletBase.cs:149 uses 'when (ex is not OutOfMemoryException and not StackOverflowException)'. ContainerService.cs:44 and VmService.cs:48 filter to 'PveApiException or HttpRequestException'. All catch(Exception) blocks in cmdlets call ThrowTerminatingError (correct PS pattern). No bare catches found anywhere in src/.

findings.title: ~95 cmdlets not sealed
findings.description: Approximately 95 cmdlet classes are not sealed, allowing unintended inheritance.

resolution.evidence: All 169 cmdlets are now sealed

findings.title: SuspendPveVmCmdlet missing ConfirmImpact.High
findings.description: Suspending a VM can cause issues but does not prompt for confirmation.

resolution.evidence: ConfirmImpact.High added to SuspendPveVmCmdlet

findings.title: RestartPveVmCmdlet missing ConfirmImpact declaration
findings.description: Restarting a VM is disruptive but does not set ConfirmImpact.

resolution.evidence: ConfirmImpact.High added to RestartPveVmCmdlet

findings.title: Dual JSON serialization attributes (JsonProperty + JsonPropertyName)
findings.description: Model classes have both Newtonsoft [JsonProperty] and System.Text.Json [JsonPropertyName] attributes. Only Newtonsoft is used at runtime.

resolution.evidence: [JsonPropertyName] attributes removed, only [JsonProperty] (Newtonsoft) remains

findings.title: HttpClient per-call pattern bypasses connection pooling
findings.description: 38 cmdlets create new PveHttpClient per operation instead of going through services, bypassing connection pooling.

resolution.evidence: IPveHttpClient interface extracted to Client/IPveHttpClient.cs. All 14 services now accept IPveHttpClient via constructor injection, enabling shared client instances. PveHttpClient implements IPveHttpClient.

findings.title: Significant integration test coverage gaps
findings.description: Many cmdlets lack end-to-end integration tests. 64 of 169 cmdlets untested in integration as of latest scan.

findings.title: Publishable projects multi-target beyond netstandard2.0
findings.description: Both publishable projects (PSProxmoxVE.csproj, PSProxmoxVE.Core.csproj) target netstandard2.0;net10.0;net48 but D009 requires publishable projects to target only netstandard2.0. Multi-targeting inflates the published module and may ship framework-specific assemblies unnecessarily.

resolution.evidence: PSProxmoxVE.csproj and PSProxmoxVE.Core.csproj now target <TargetFramework>netstandard2.0</TargetFramework> only. All #if NET48/NETSTANDARD2_0 conditionals removed from PveHttpClient.cs. build.yml restructured. Test project retains net10.0+net48.

findings.title: Sync-over-async via GetAwaiter().GetResult()
findings.description: ~216 call sites use .GetAwaiter().GetResult(). Standard for PS binary modules but carries theoretical deadlock risk. Accepted tradeoff for PS 5.1 compatibility.
findings.notes: Accepted tradeoff: PowerShell binary modules targeting netstandard2.0 for PS 5.1 Desktop compatibility have no async pipeline. .GetAwaiter().GetResult() is the standard pattern used by all major PS binary modules. No deadlock risk in practice because PveHttpClient uses ConfigureAwait(false).

findings.title: Auth header names are magic strings
findings.description: Auth header names (PVEAPIToken=, CSRFPreventionToken) are inline string literals instead of named constants.

resolution.evidence: Extracted to const string ApiTokenPrefix and CsrfHeaderName fields

findings.title: URL-encode snapshot/node names in API paths
findings.description: Snapshot names and node names in URL paths are not URL-encoded. Low risk as values come from validated/system sources, but defense-in-depth recommends encoding.

resolution.evidence: Uri.EscapeDataString() now used consistently across all services

findings.title: SetPveVmGuestPassword uses plain string not SecureString
findings.description: Guest password parameter is a plain string instead of SecureString, inconsistent with Connect-PveServer's credential handling.

resolution.evidence: Now uses SecureString with Marshal.SecureStringToGlobalAllocUnicode + ZeroFreeGlobalAllocUnicode in try/finally

findings.title: Debug script contains hardcoded API token and IP
findings.description: debug/Capture-UploadDiff.ps1 contained a hardcoded API token and PVE host IP.

resolution.evidence: Replaced with placeholder tokens: <PVE_HOST>, <USER>@<REALM>!<TOKENID>=<TOKEN_UUID>

findings.title: HA subsystem 0% coverage
findings.description: 21 HA endpoints + 5 new PVE 9.0 endpoints. Essential for production clusters. Resources, groups, status, and rules.

findings.title: Ceph subsystem 0% coverage
findings.description: 40 endpoints for OSD, MON, pool, status operations. Critical for hyperconverged infrastructure.

findings.title: Access groups and domains cmdlets missing
findings.description: No cmdlets for /access/groups or /access/domains CRUD. Useful for LDAP/AD integration.

resolution.evidence: 8 cmdlets added: Get/New/Set/Remove-PveGroup and Get/New/Set/Remove-PveDomain plus Set-PvePassword

findings.title: PSGallery version badge missing
findings.description: README should show PSGallery version badge after first publish.

resolution.evidence: PSGallery badge present in README badges

findings.title: SDN IPAM/DNS/Controller cmdlets missing
findings.description: SDN zones/VNets/subnets covered but IPAM, DNS, and controller management missing.

resolution.evidence: 12 cmdlets added: Get/New/Remove/Set for SdnIpam, SdnDns, SdnController plus Invoke-PveSdnApply

findings.title: Infinite loop task-polling in container snapshot and storage cmdlets
findings.description: while(true) with no timeout in NewPveContainerSnapshot, RemovePveContainerSnapshot, RestorePveContainerSnapshot, InvokePveStorageDownload, and SendPveFile. Same anti-pattern that was fixed in VM snapshot cmdlets. Cmdlets hang forever if task stalls.

resolution.evidence: All 5 cmdlets now use TaskService.WaitForTask (NewPveContainerSnapshotCmdlet.cs:67, RemovePveContainerSnapshotCmdlet.cs:59, RestorePveContainerSnapshotCmdlet.cs:62, InvokePveStorageDownloadCmdlet.cs:74, SendPveFileCmdlet.cs:134). No while(true) task-polling loops remain in any of these files.

findings.title: VM/CT-level firewall 0% coverage
findings.description: ~44 combined endpoints for per-VM and per-CT firewall rules. Cluster-level is covered (21 cmdlets) but VM/CT-level is not.

findings.title: Cluster config 0% coverage
findings.description: 10 endpoints for cluster create/join/node management. Fundamental for multi-node cluster automation.

findings.title: PVE 9.0 endpoints 0% coverage
findings.description: 42 new PVE 9.0 endpoints available (HA rules, SDN fabrics, bulk actions, OCI registry). None implemented.

findings.title: RestartPveContainerCmdlet missing ConfirmImpact.High
findings.description: RestartPveVmCmdlet has ConfirmImpact.High but the container counterpart does not. Inconsistent.

resolution.evidence: RestartPveContainerCmdlet.cs:15 now has ConfirmImpact = ConfirmImpact.High, matching RestartPveVmCmdlet.

findings.title: SuspendPveContainerCmdlet missing ConfirmImpact.High
findings.description: SuspendPveVmCmdlet has ConfirmImpact.High but the container counterpart does not. Inconsistent.

resolution.evidence: SuspendPveContainerCmdlet.cs:14 now has ConfirmImpact = ConfirmImpact.High, matching SuspendPveVmCmdlet.

findings.title: System.Management.Automation pinned to 7.4.0
findings.description: Consider updating when migrating to .NET 10 target framework.

resolution.evidence: net10.0 ItemGroup with System.Management.Automation 7.5.0 removed from PSProxmoxVE.csproj as part of F047 netstandard2.0-only migration. Publishable project now uses PowerShellStandard.Library 5.1.1 unconditionally.

findings.title: No config.yml for issue templates
findings.description: No .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/config.yml to control blank issue creation.

resolution.evidence: .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/config.yml exists with blank_issues_enabled: false and contact_links to Discussions.

findings.title: No CODEOWNERS file
findings.description: Documents ownership for PR auto-assignment. Low priority for single-maintainer project.

resolution.evidence: CODEOWNERS file exists (15 bytes) in repo root.

findings.title: Disk management 0% coverage
findings.description: 18 endpoints for LVM, ZFS, SMART, wipe operations. Needed for storage provisioning.

findings.title: Notifications subsystem 0% coverage
findings.description: 32 cluster notification endpoints. New in PVE 8.1+, essential for monitoring/alerting automation.

findings.title: ACME/Certificates 0% coverage
findings.description: 23 combined endpoints for TLS certificate management and ACME.

findings.title: Verify netstandard2.0 loads on Windows PowerShell 5.1
findings.description: Publish workflow builds only netstandard2.0 but manifest declares Desktop compatible with DotNetFrameworkVersion 4.8. Should add PS 5.1 smoke test.

resolution.evidence: publish.yml now includes smoke-test-ps51 job on windows-latest that imports the netstandard2.0 module in Windows PowerShell 5.1 (shell: powershell) and verifies command count >= 150. Publish job depends on smoke test passing.

findings.title: Missing Uri.EscapeDataString in cmdlet URL constructions
findings.description: GetPveTemplateCmdlet.cs:52 uses nodes/{node}/qemu without Uri.EscapeDataString on the node variable. All other previously cited cmdlets (~14) have been fixed. 1 instance remains.
findings.notes: Reduced from ~15 files to 1 in scan-5. All network, snapshot, container snapshot, storage, and CloudInit cmdlets now use EscapeDataString.

resolution.evidence: GetPveTemplateCmdlet.cs:53 now uses Uri.EscapeDataString(node) in the API path. Added using System; directive.

findings.title: Unnecessary System.Text.Json dependency in Core.csproj
findings.description: System.Text.Json 8.0.5 referenced for netstandard2.0/net48 targets despite D008 Newtonsoft-only policy. No [JsonPropertyName] attributes or System.Text.Json namespaces in source. Dependency appears unused and adds to assembly surface area.

resolution.evidence: System.Text.Json no longer referenced in PSProxmoxVE.Core.csproj. grep -c System.Text.Json returns 0.

findings.title: build.yml references net9.0 but test project targets net10.0
findings.description: build.yml workflow builds and tests with --framework net9.0 but the test project now targets net10.0;net48. The workflow will fail because the test csproj no longer has a net9.0 target.

resolution.evidence: build.yml now references --framework net10.0 at lines 51-53. No net9.0 references remain in build.yml.

findings.title: Publish workflow smoke test threshold too low
findings.description: Publish workflow checks module has >= 60 commands but module exports ~169 cmdlets. Threshold should be ~150 to catch regressions that drop significant cmdlets.

resolution.evidence: publish.yml:58 checks commands.Count -lt 150 (was 60). With 169 exported cmdlets, threshold of 150 catches regressions while allowing minor variance.

findings.title: ~88 cmdlets lack markdown help documentation
findings.description: Only 81 of ~169 exported cmdlets have markdown help docs in docs/cmdlets/. Newer cmdlets added since initial documentation pass are missing.

resolution.evidence: 170 markdown help docs in docs/cmdlets/ for 169 exported cmdlets. All cmdlets now have documentation.

findings.title: No dependabot or renovate for dependency updates
findings.description: No .github/dependabot.yml or renovate.json for automated dependency update PRs. NuGet and GitHub Actions versions will drift without manual monitoring.

resolution.evidence: .github/dependabot.yml created with nuget (weekly) and github-actions (weekly) ecosystems targeting main branch.

findings.title: GetPveTaskListCmdlet VmId parameter missing ValidateRange
findings.description: Optional VmId parameter (int?, line 29) lacks [ValidateRange(100, 999999999)] attribute. Per D010, all VmId parameters must have ValidateRange regardless of whether mandatory or optional.

resolution.evidence: GetPveTaskListCmdlet.cs:29 now has [ValidateRange(100, 999999999)] on the VmId parameter, matching D010 convention.

findings.title: No service-layer or PveHttpClient unit tests
findings.description: Zero xUnit tests for any of the 14 service classes (VmService, ContainerService, StorageService, etc.) or PveHttpClient. Model deserialization tests exist but no tests for API call construction, error handling, or business logic in services.

resolution.evidence: 196 new service unit tests across 10 test files in tests/PSProxmoxVE.Core.Tests/Services/. All 14 services now have IPveHttpClient constructor injection enabling Moq-based testing. Total test count: 382 (was 186).

findings.title: unit-tests.yml uses dotnet SDK 9.0.x, inconsistent with build.yml 10.0.x
findings.description: unit-tests.yml:31 installs dotnet-version 9.0.x while build.yml uses 10.0.x. The unit-tests workflow only builds netstandard2.0 and net48 so this works functionally, but the SDK versions should be consistent across workflows.

resolution.evidence: unit-tests.yml line 31 changed from dotnet-version 9.0.x to 10.0.x, matching build.yml and the test project net10.0 TFM.

findings.title: Restart-PveContainer CI failure: ConfirmImpact.High blocks non-interactive CI
findings.description: Restart-PveContainer now has ConfirmImpact.High (F062 fix) which prompts for confirmation in non-interactive CI. The integration test at line 983 does not pass -Confirm:$false, causing a NullReferenceException when the cmdlet tries to read the confirmation response.

resolution.evidence: Added -Confirm:$false to Restart-PveContainer call at Integration.Tests.ps1:983. All other destructive cmdlet calls in the integration test already had -Confirm:$false.

findings.title: Copy-PveContainer CI failure: cascading from Restart-PveContainer failure
findings.description: Copy-PveContainer test fails with PveApiException: Cannot do full clones on a running container without snapshots. Container was still running because Restart-PveContainer (F080) failed to restart it. Test ordering dependency.

resolution.evidence: Cascading failure from F080. With Restart-PveContainer now passing -Confirm:$false, the container will be properly stopped before the clone test runs.

findings.title: PVE 8 integration: Docker container image not found
findings.description: PVE 8 integration job fails at Initialize containers step — Docker image ghcr.io/goodolclint/psproxmoxve-integration:<sha> not found. The container-image build job may have failed or the image was not pushed for this commit.

findings.title: CONTRIBUTING.md references .NET SDK 9.0+ (should be 10.0+)
findings.description: CONTRIBUTING.md line 9 says ".NET SDK 9.0+" but all workflows use dotnet SDK 10.0.x and the test project targets net10.0. Contributors following CONTRIBUTING.md will install the wrong SDK version.

resolution.evidence: CONTRIBUTING.md line 9 changed from .NET SDK 9.0+ to .NET SDK 10.0+, matching all CI workflows and test project TFM.
